message:
Add premium packs CLI command for managing curated prompt collections

Introduce jfp packs command for Pro subscribers to browse, install, and
manage premium prompt packs - curated collections of prompts organized
by topic/use-case.

New command: jfp packs [action] [id]
- jfp packs list: Browse available premium packs with install status
- jfp packs list --installed: Show only installed packs
- jfp packs show <id>: View pack details including prompt list
- jfp packs install <id>: Install a pack (adds prompts to saved library)
- jfp packs uninstall <id>: Remove a pack from your library
- --tool <tool>: Associate installation with a specific tool (optional)
- --json: Machine-readable output for all actions

API client enhancements:
- Handle unified response format (ok/data/error envelope)
- Extract nested error messages for better error reporting
- Maintain backward compatibility with legacy response formats

Requires active Pro subscription. Unauthenticated/free users receive
clear upgrade prompts rather than cryptic errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
